initial_candidates.sql:
WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'withdrawal' THEN txn_amount ELSE 0 END) AS month_end_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    WHERE txn_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%m', txn_date)
),
positive_customers_per_month AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        COUNT(*) AS positive_customer_count,
        AVG(month_end_balance) AS avg_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
    WHERE month_end_balance > 0
    GROUP BY month
),
ranked_months AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        positive_customer_count,
        avg_balance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count DESC) AS rank_high,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count ASC) AS rank_low
    FROM positive_customers_per_month
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_balance FROM ranked_months WHERE rank_high = 1) - 
    (SELECT avg_balance FROM ranked_months WHERE rank_low = 1) AS difference
FROM ranked_months
LIMIT 1;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount
                WHEN txn_type = 'withdrawal' THEN -txn_amount
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS month_end_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    WHERE txn_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%m', txn_date)
),
positive_customers_per_month AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        COUNT(*) AS positive_customer_count,
        AVG(month_end_balance) AS avg_balance_positive_customers
    FROM monthly_balances
    WHERE month_end_balance > 0
    GROUP BY month
),
extreme_months AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        positive_customer_count,
        avg_balance_positive_customers,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count DESC) AS desc_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count ASC) AS asc_rank
    FROM positive_customers_per_month
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_balance_positive_customers FROM extreme_months WHERE desc_rank = 1) - 
    (SELECT avg_balance_positive_customers FROM extreme_months WHERE asc_rank = 1) AS difference
FROM extreme_months
LIMIT 1;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'withdrawal' THEN txn_amount ELSE 0 END) AS month_end_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    WHERE txn_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%m', txn_date)
),
positive_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        COUNT(*) AS positive_customer_count,
        AVG(month_end_balance) AS avg_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
    WHERE month_end_balance > 0
    GROUP BY month
),
extremes AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        positive_customer_count,
        avg_balance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count DESC) AS rn_desc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count ASC) AS rn_asc
    FROM positive_counts
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_balance FROM extremes WHERE rn_desc = 1) - 
    (SELECT avg_balance FROM extremes WHERE rn_asc = 1) AS difference
FROM extremes
LIMIT 1;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount
                WHEN txn_type = 'withdrawal' THEN -txn_amount
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS month_end_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    WHERE txn_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%m', txn_date)
),
positive_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        COUNT(*) AS positive_customer_count,
        AVG(month_end_balance) AS avg_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
    WHERE month_end_balance > 0
    GROUP BY month
),
ranked_months AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        positive_customer_count,
        avg_balance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count DESC) AS desc_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count ASC) AS asc_rank
    FROM positive_counts
),
top_bottom_months AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(CASE WHEN desc_rank = 1 THEN avg_balance END) AS highest_avg_balance,
        MAX(CASE WHEN asc_rank = 1 THEN avg_balance END) AS lowest_avg_balance
    FROM ranked_months
)
SELECT 
    highest_avg_balance - lowest_avg_balance AS difference
FROM top_bottom_months;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'withdrawal' THEN txn_amount ELSE 0 END) AS month_end_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    WHERE txn_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%m', txn_date)
),
positive_customer_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        COUNT(*) AS positive_customers,
        AVG(month_end_balance) AS avg_balance_positive_customers
    FROM monthly_balances
    WHERE month_end_balance > 0
    GROUP BY month
),
highest_positive AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        avg_balance_positive_customers
    FROM positive_customer_counts
    ORDER BY positive_customers DESC, month ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
lowest_positive AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        avg_balance_positive_customers
    FROM positive_customer_counts
    ORDER BY positive_customers ASC, month ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    h.avg_balance_positive_customers - l.avg_balance_positive_customers AS difference
FROM highest_positive h, lowest_positive l;

                ELSE 0
            END

),
positive_counts AS (

        AVG(month_end_balance) AS avg_balance

    WHERE month_end_balance > 0
    GROUP BY month
),
ranked_months AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        positive_customer_count,
        avg_balance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count DESC) AS desc_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count ASC) AS asc_rank

),
top_bottom_months AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(CASE WHEN desc_rank = 1 THEN avg_balance END) AS highest_avg_balance,
        MAX(CASE WHEN asc_rank = 1 THEN avg_balance END) AS lowest_avg_balance
    FROM ranked_months
)
SELECT 
    highest_avg_balance - lowest_avg_balance AS difference
FROM top_bottom_months;

candidates.sql:
WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS month_end_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    WHERE txn_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%m', txn_date)
),
monthly_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE month_end_balance > 0) AS positive_customers,
        AVG(CASE WHEN month_end_balance > 0 THEN month_end_balance END) AS avg_balance_positive_customers
    FROM monthly_balances
    GROUP BY month
),
ranked_months AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        positive_customers,
        avg_balance_positive_customers,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customers DESC, month ASC) AS rank_highest,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customers ASC, month ASC) AS rank_lowest
    FROM monthly_stats
)
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN rank_highest = 1 THEN avg_balance_positive_customers END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN rank_lowest = 1 THEN avg_balance_positive_customers END) AS difference
FROM ranked_months
WHERE rank_highest = 1 OR rank_lowest = 1;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS month_end_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    WHERE txn_date LIKE '2020%'
      AND txn_type IN ('deposit', 'withdrawal')
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%m', txn_date)
),
positive_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        COUNT(*) AS positive_count,
        AVG(month_end_balance) AS avg_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
    WHERE month_end_balance > 0
    GROUP BY month
),
extremes AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        avg_balance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_count DESC, month ASC) AS rn_high,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY positive_count ASC, month ASC) AS rn_low
    FROM positive_counts
)
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn_high = 1 THEN avg_balance END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn_low = 1 THEN avg_balance END) AS difference
FROM extremes;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS month_end_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    WHERE txn_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%m', txn_date)
),
positive_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        COUNT(*) AS positive_customer_count,
        AVG(month_end_balance) AS avg_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
    WHERE month_end_balance > 0
    GROUP BY month
),
ranked_months AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        avg_balance,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count DESC) AS desc_rank,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count ASC) AS asc_rank
    FROM positive_counts
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_balance FROM ranked_months WHERE desc_rank = 1) - 
    (SELECT avg_balance FROM ranked_months WHERE asc_rank = 1) AS difference
LIMIT 1;

WITH monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%m', txn_date) AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS month_end_balance
    FROM customer_transactions
    WHERE txn_date LIKE '2020%'
      AND txn_type IN ('deposit', 'withdrawal')
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%m', txn_date)
),
positive_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        COUNT(*) AS positive_customer_count,
        AVG(month_end_balance) AS avg_balance
    FROM monthly_balances
    WHERE month_end_balance > 0
    GROUP BY month
),
ranked_months AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        avg_balance,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count DESC) AS rank_high,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY positive_customer_count ASC) AS rank_low
    FROM positive_counts
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_balance FROM ranked_months WHERE rank_high = 1) - 
    (SELECT avg_balance FROM ranked_months WHERE rank_low = 1) AS difference
LIMIT 1;
